reason: Bitcoin is experiencing significant downward pressure, falling below $67,000, exacerbated by Core Scientific selling $175 million in BTC. This coincides with broader U.S. equities sliding, indicating a risk-off sentiment. The collapse of a Solana meme coin and its disavowal by a political figure underscore the high speculative risk in certain crypto assets and could invite further regulatory scrutiny. While Tether's reserve report brings transparency, it does not offset the immediate selling pressure and macro headwinds.
headlines: Japan prime minister Sanae Takaichi disavows Solana meme coin after it crashes by 75%
Tether taps Deloitte for first USAT reserve report
Bitcoin falls below $67,000 as U.S. equities slide and oil pushes higher
OKX jumps into AI agent race with new OnchainOS toolkit
Core Scientific sells $175 million in bitcoin as AI pivot accelerates
